title: field syntax
text: field syntax A property of a field that defines the characters that are allowed in the field and the restrictions applicable to data entry. The basic syntax is implicitly determined by the data type. Related Links Field Syntax The Field Syntax property specifies the input format for data, including the entry format (for example, 1-Dec-14 or 20141201), the allowed characters, and whether the field is mandatory or read-only.
